title: Bambino Grey Soft Plush Bunny Rabbit Soft Toy Large 31cm
description: Give the precious new arrival a gift to be cherished and snuggled for a lifetime with this super-soft plush grey rabbit. From Bambino Baby Gifts & Keepsakes - keeping the earliest memories alive forever. This large 31cm bunny rabbit features the softest grey fur and with fabric nose and eyes he is safe from birth. The perfect comforting companion for your tiny new arrival. Product Details Brand : Widdop Height (cm) : 34.5 Width (cm) : 21 Depth (cm) : 22.5 Weight (kg) : 0.27 Colour : Grey Finish : Fabric - Other Type : Other Bears
